race.comment: JUNE (5) peaks and has been racing well in town. Missed 1L over a mile at Doomben two back and was okay at Eagle Farm this distance last time. Much better placed today and gets his chance. GREY NORTHERN (12) just missed here over 1625m first-up this grade and then was only beaten 2L at Doomben. That form stacks up, and with the extra fitness, has to be considered. ELEANOR NANCY (14) has been racing well over a mile and tumbles in weight. Has a wide barrier but is likely to push forward and is well in the mix. WOWIT'S WILLYWONKA (7) has been within range here his last two over a 1625m. Raced as the favourite last time and has a strong record this course/distance. Has to be kept onside.
